reason: All test steps executed successfully. Agent "QA-20260418-190641-l2rp" responded correctly to the math question with the answer "4" within 3 seconds.
steps: Step 1 - Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — App loaded successfully showing home page with three agents in sidebar.
Step 2 - Found and clicked "QA-20260418-190641-l2rp" agent in sidebar — Agent detail page opened successfully, showing agent name in header and sidebar session list expanded.
Step 3 - Verified agent status — Status indicator showed "idle" (blue dot), which meets requirement of "running" or "idle".

Step 4 - Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message was typed into input field successfully, send button became enabled, and message was submitted. Agent status changed to "working" and new session "Basic Math Question Session" was created.
Step 5 - Waited for response — Agent responded in approximately 3 seconds (well within 3-minute limit). Activity indicator showed "Working..." during processing, then agent returned to "idle" status.

Step 6 - Verified response mentions "4" — Agent response clearly displayed the number "4" in the chat view, with processing time shown as "Worked for 3s". User message shown as "Hello! What is 2+2?" at top right of conversation.
